test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new author can be created with valid name, bio, and born_year.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author without the required 'name' field returns a validation error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing author can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a non-existent author returns a 404 error.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verifies that a conditional GET with a matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with a mismatched ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author with no associated books can be deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_associated_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with associated books returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new category can be created with valid name and description.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a category with a duplicate name returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new book can be created with valid data including author and category.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with an ISBN of invalid length returns a validation error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing book can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_ineligible_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns 400 Bad Request.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verifies that exceeding the rate limit for the discount endpoint returns 429 Too Many Requests.

test_cases.name: update_book_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that the stock of a book can be updated with a valid quantity.

test_cases.name: update_book_stock_with_insufficient_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating stock to a negative value returns 400 Bad Request.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that a valid cover image (JPEG/PNG) can be uploaded for a book.

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_cover_image_type
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading an unsupported file type returns 415 Unsupported Media Type.

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading a file larger than 2 MB returns 413 Content Too Large.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a review can be created for an existing book.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a review for a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that tags can be added to an existing book.

test_cases.name: add_nonexistent_tags_to_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that adding non-existent tags to a book returns 404 Not Found.
